# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_xcom_sidecar_does_not_reference_airflow_core_conf_and_exposes_param__a1():
    """
    The k8s provider utility should not read core Airflow settings (airflow.configuration.conf).
    Instead, it should allow callers (e.g. operator/hook/connection plumbing) to pass the
    sidecar image via a function parameter.
    """
    source = open('/workspace/airflow/providers/cncf/kubernetes/utils/xcom_sidecar.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'from airflow.configuration import conf' not in source, 'k8s provider code must not import core Airflow conf (airflow.configuration.conf).'

def test_xcom_sidecar_does_not_reference_airflow_core_conf_and_exposes_param__a2():
    """
    The k8s provider utility should not read core Airflow settings (airflow.configuration.conf).
    Instead, it should allow callers (e.g. operator/hook/connection plumbing) to pass the
    sidecar image via a function parameter.
    """
    source = open('/workspace/airflow/providers/cncf/kubernetes/utils/xcom_sidecar.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'conf.get(' not in source, 'k8s provider code must not call conf.get(); sidecar customization should be externalized.'

def test_xcom_sidecar_does_not_reference_airflow_core_conf_and_exposes_param__a3():
    """
    The k8s provider utility should not read core Airflow settings (airflow.configuration.conf).
    Instead, it should allow callers (e.g. operator/hook/connection plumbing) to pass the
    sidecar image via a function parameter.
    """
    source = open('/workspace/airflow/providers/cncf/kubernetes/utils/xcom_sidecar.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert re.search('def\\s+add_xcom_sidecar\\(\\s*pod\\s*:\\s*k8s\\.V1Pod\\s*,', source), 'add_xcom_sidecar should accept pod as first arg and include a keyword-only parameter for sidecar container image customization.'

def test_xcom_sidecar_does_not_reference_airflow_core_conf_and_exposes_param__a4():
    """
    The k8s provider utility should not read core Airflow settings (airflow.configuration.conf).
    Instead, it should allow callers (e.g. operator/hook/connection plumbing) to pass the
    sidecar image via a function parameter.
    """
    source = open('/workspace/airflow/providers/cncf/kubernetes/utils/xcom_sidecar.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'sidecar_container_image' in source, 'add_xcom_sidecar must expose a sidecar_container_image parameter (set by operator/hook/conn).'
